paper.title_en: Evaporation and fate of covariant quantum black holes
paper.abstract_en: A growing number of phenomena and theoretical problems indicate that quantum gravity theory is necessary. In this paper, we investigate the evaporation of covariant quantum BHs for particles with different spins and compare the results with the Schwarzschild case. Our results show that the Hawking radiation and mass loss rate of covariant quantum BHs differ from those of Schwarzschild BHs and they depend on the spins of the emitted particles. Therefore, these results suggest that it may be insufficient to consider only BH evaporation in the massless scalar field case and may provide a possible way to test loop quantum gravity in the future.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 该论文研究了协变量子黑洞的霍金辐射和蒸发速率，并与史瓦西黑洞进行了比较，发现辐射依赖于出射粒子的自旋，为圈量子引力提供了潜在检验途径。
decision.title_zh: 协变量子黑洞的蒸发与命运
decision.abstract_zh: 越来越多的现象和理论问题表明，量子引力理论是必要的。在本文中，我们研究了协变量子黑洞对于不同自旋粒子的蒸发，并将结果与史瓦西情况进行了比较。我们的结果表明，协变量子黑洞的霍金辐射和质量损失率与史瓦西黑洞不同，并且它们依赖于出射粒子的自旋。因此，这些结果表明，仅考虑无质量标量场情况下的黑洞蒸发可能是不充分的，并可能为未来检验圈量子引力提供一种可能的方法。
